name: spectra-init
description: Initialize SPECTRA project configuration and load config variables. Use when any skill needs module-specific configuration values, or when setting up a new SPECTRA project.

name: spectra-help
description: Analyzes current state and user query to answer SPECTRA questions or recommend the next skill(s) to use. Use when user asks for help, spectra help, what to do next, or what to start with.

name: spectra-war-room
description: Multi-agent adversarial debate. Use when the user says "war room" or wants Red vs Blue discussion on a security topic.

name: spectra-debrief
description: Post-engagement or post-exercise review and lessons learned. Use when the user says "debrief" or "lessons learned" or "post-mortem".

name: spectra-new-engagement
description: Create a new security engagement with scope, rules of engagement, and authorization context. Use when starting a new pentest, assessment, or exercise.

name: spectra-scope-check
description: Verify that a target or action is within the current engagement scope. Use before any offensive action.

name: spectra-close-engagement
description: Close and archive a completed engagement with final reporting and evidence packaging.

name: spectra-report-generator
description: Generate standardized security reports — pentest, incident, compliance, executive brief.

name: spectra-evidence-chain
description: Manage chain of custody for digital evidence. Track acquisition, storage, and transfer.

name: spectra-executive-brief
description: Generate C-level executive summary from engagement findings.

name: spectra-agent-specter
description: CISO and Quick Ops Solo Analyst. Use when the user asks to talk to Specter or needs cross-domain rapid assessment.

name: spectra-agent-chronicle
description: Security Documentation Specialist. Use when the user asks to talk to Chronicle or needs pentest reports, incident reports, executive briefs, or any security documentation.

name: spectra-agent-red-lead
description: Red Team Lead. Use when the user asks to talk to Viper or requests red team coordination.

name: spectra-agent-recon
